title: serapias cordigera var. leucoglottis
intro: Serapias cordigera var. leucoglottis, also known as the Yellow Form of the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. Serapias cordigera var. leucoglottis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
